questionHtml: Draw the same chromosomes to show their structure at the same stage of meiosis if there had been one chiasma between two gene loci.
markschemeHtml:
all four upper arms with one A and both chromosomes with one B and one b on the lower arms;

The chromatids can be shown as single lines rather than the wider versions in the question.

meta.title: Draw the same chromosomes to show their structure at the same stage of meiosis if there had been one chiasma between two gene loci.
